heading: Foresthome vs Fork Lagoons — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Foresthome, Queensland and Fork Lagoons, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Foresthome has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Fork Lagoons (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Foresthome or Fork Lagoons safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Foresthome has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Fork Lagoons scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Foresthome scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Fork Lagoons scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Foresthome or Fork Lagoons?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Foresthome has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
